hero.title: We believe that ending poverty is not only possible — it's within reach, and together, we can make it happen today.
hero.subtitle: Why wait for change? Support a PRIME Society today.
hero.pill: 40 Civic Tech Apps · Powered by Kairos

home.about_title: A formula for a poverty-free, sustainable future.
home.about_p1: PRIME Society is a nonprofit federation that provides what we believe is the formula for a poverty-free and sustainable future — through cutting-edge tools, best practices, and open standards.
home.about_p2: We are a global initiative dedicated to pioneering next-generation governance models designed to eradicate poverty through AGE-Zones policies (Autonomous Governance Experimental Zones).
home.tools_title: Tools, frameworks and open standards for a new architecture of power.
home.tools_subtitle: A growing toolkit designed to empower communities, governments and organizations to build resilient, transparent, purpose-driven systems.
home.tools_constitution_desc: A foundational framework establishing the principles, rights and responsibilities of PRIME Societies.
home.tools_tax_desc: A streamlined, transparent taxation model aligned with purpose-driven outcomes and measurable results.
home.tools_voting_desc: Decentralized, verifiable voting mechanisms designed for trust, participation and accountability.
home.tools_city_desc: The blueprint for City 5.0 — urban systems engineered around purpose, data and human flourishing.
home.tools_extra: Discover additional tools: PRIME Auditing, PRIME DAO, PRIME Digital Citizenship, PRIME Framework, PRIME Immigration & Migration, PRIME Judicial, PRIME Lessons Learned, PRIME Open Standards, PRIME Purpose-Board, PRIME Resilience & Crisis Management, PRIME Rule-Based-System, PRIME Society Contract, PRIME Society Franchisee, PRIME Supply & Demand, PRIME Training, Kairos, PrimeTalks…
home.team_subtitle: A multidisciplinary team of leaders, experts and ambassadors building PRIME Society around the world.
home.news_title: Shaping Tomorrow's Cities and Society Today
home.news1_title: AI and the Fight Against Poverty: Friend or Foe?
home.news2_title: Culture as a Determining Factor of Success: Can It Be Influenced?
home.news3_title: From Guesswork to Evidence: When Data Steers the Course to Decisions
home.newsletter_subtitle: Subscribe to receive the latest articles, research and announcements.
home.kairos_title: Kairos — Where Civic Coordination Becomes Reality
home.kairos_p1: Kairos is PRIME Society's flagship platform — a modular civic operating system that coordinates time, goods, capital, opportunities, trust and governance across 40 apps.
home.kairos_p2: Everything succeeds if Kairos succeeds. It is the infrastructure layer that turns vision into measurable impact.
home.kairos_feat1: Micro-Voluntarism — match skills to urgent civic tasks
home.kairos_feat3: Impact Funding — outcome-based grants with trust scoring
home.kairos_feat4: Hestia AI — intelligent automation with human oversight
home.apps_subtitle: From food rescue to civic governance — every app coordinates one dimension of the problem. Together, they form a complete operating system for human flourishing.
home.cta_title: Every contribution builds a poverty-free world.
home.cta_subtitle: Support the infrastructure that coordinates time, goods, capital and trust across 40 civic apps. Your donation funds the tools that make change measurable.

footer.copyright: PRIME Society. Innovation for a Poverty-Free Future.

app.refugee_integration_desc: Language, housing and employment pathways for displaced communities.

app.anti_corruption_desc: Secure, anonymous channel for reporting corruption with audit trails.
app.budget_transparency_desc: Public dashboards for municipal spending, contracts and outcomes.
app.civic_participation_desc: Participatory budgeting and digital democracy tools for communities.

app.dropout_prevention_desc: Early warning systems and mentorship to keep at-risk students in school.

app.impact_funding_desc: Outcome-based grant management with milestone verification and trust scoring.
app.universal_desc: The meta-layer connecting any offer to any need at city scale.

about.title: PRIME Society
about.quote: “Humanity's greatest challenges are of its own making. It's hard to believe that the very governance structures that enabled these problems can be trusted to solve them.”
about.quote_attr: — Daniel R. Schnaider, Co-founder, PRIME Society
about.p1: The world has entered an era of unprecedented complexity. From environmental crises to the rise of disinformation, from poverty to the ethical dilemmas of advancing technologies, the systems we rely on to govern our societies were not designed to address the scale and urgency of these challenges. The mechanisms that once brought stability and progress now struggle to keep pace with the interconnected and rapidly changing reality we face.
about.p2: This is not a failure of individuals, but of frameworks that have not evolved to meet the needs of the 21st century. It is here, in this gap between outdated structures and the demands of our time, that the need for PRIME Society emerges.
about.what_p1: PRIME Society is an ambitious initiative dedicated to reimagining governance and societal structures for the challenges of today and the opportunities of tomorrow. At its core, PRIME Society provides a flexible framework designed to empower communities, governments, and organizations to create resilient, transparent, and purpose-driven systems that work more intelligently and effectively than the available alternatives.
about.what_p2: PRIME stands for Purpose, Results, Innovation, Measurement, and Empirical — five principles that guide our approach. These principles shape the tools, standards, and frameworks we offer, ensuring they are practical, adaptable, and grounded in data and evidence. Unlike traditional governance models that often impose centralized solutions, PRIME Society champions decentralized, interoperable, and innovative systems that allow societies to evolve on their own terms. Our motto is "Innovation for a Poverty-Free Future" — our purpose.
about.mission_p1: PRIME Society's vision is a world free from poverty. We believe this can be achieved through a governance framework that attracts private investment and human capital from around the globe. We propose an upgraded version of the Public-Private Partnership or Concession model — called AGE-Zone (Autonomous Governance Experimental Zones) — to unlock transformative potential.
about.mission_p2: Join us in creating a new architecture of power: a society where purpose drives progress, results are measurable, and innovation through interoperability unlocks the potential of every individual and group alike.
about.leadership_name: Daniel R. Schnaider — Co-Founder and President of PRIME Society
about.leadership_p1: Daniel R. Schnaider is a visionary entrepreneur and thought leader committed to redefining governance and societal frameworks for the modern era's challenges. As the co-founder and visionary behind PRIME Society, he brings a wealth of experience across diverse industries, blending cutting-edge innovation with a deep commitment to societal progress.
about.leadership_p2: Mr. Schnaider brings extensive experience in Mergers and Acquisitions as well as AI-powered supply chains. His professional journey is distinguished by pioneering contributions across multiple fields, including his tenure as CEO of Powerfleet BR (NASDAQ: AIOT). Earlier in his career, he contributed to key technological advancements in banking, financial markets, insurance, and telecommunications during his time at IBM. Additionally, he co-founded HSBC mCash, a groundbreaking venture in payment technology.
about.leadership_p3: Mr. Schnaider's entrepreneurial spirit and drive for innovation were evident early in his career. He was a trailblazer in e-commerce (1993–1996), cloud computing technologies (1997–1999), and digital currencies (2000), well before these fields became mainstream. These formative experiences shaped his understanding of systemic inefficiencies and inspired his pursuit of frameworks that empower societies to evolve and thrive.
about.leadership_p4: During his tenure as a consultant to the Brazilian government, Mr. Schnaider gained firsthand insight into the challenges of governance at scale. He observed how even the most competent and dedicated individuals could become hindered by a monolithic bureaucracy, outdated procedures, and structural inefficiencies. While he encountered inspiring professionals striving for progress, their efforts were often stymied by an imbalance of power, misaligned incentives, and the inertia of legacy systems. These experiences further fueled his commitment to designing frameworks, like those in PRIME Society, that empower societies to break free from such constraints and achieve measurable, purpose-driven outcomes.
about.leadership_p5: In addition to his business achievements, his service as a member of the Israeli Special Forces Intelligence Service instilled a profound appreciation for in-depth understanding, problem-solving, and effective execution — qualities that resonate in his work with PRIME Society.
about.leadership_p6: Academically, Mr. Schnaider has a multidisciplinary background, having studied Behavioral Economics, Business Administration, Software Engineering, Mathematics for Logistics, and Artificial Intelligence.
about.leadership_p7: He is the author of two published books — one on management and the other on the future of mobility — and has had his articles published in renowned outlets.

intro.title: Introduction to PRIME Society
intro.subtitle: A short orientation to who we are, what we believe and what we're building.
intro.p1: PRIME Society is a global, nonprofit federation that believes governance can — and must — be reinvented to meet the challenges of the 21st century. We bring together leaders, researchers, ambassadors and communities around a shared mission: Innovation for a Poverty-Free Future.
intro.p_purpose: Purpose — every initiative, tool and policy is anchored to a clear, measurable purpose.
intro.p_results: Results — success is defined by outcomes, not effort.
intro.p_innovation: Innovation — interoperable, decentralized solutions that allow societies to evolve.
intro.p_measurement: Measurement — every policy is testable, observable and improvable.
intro.p_empirical: Empirical — decisions are guided by data and evidence, not opinion or tradition.
intro.what_p: We design and curate open standards, frameworks and reference implementations — the PRIME Tools — that communities, governments and organizations can adopt to build resilient, transparent and purpose-driven systems. From taxation and voting to constitutional design and urban planning, the toolkit is a living, growing library of ways to do governance better.
intro.fit_p: Whether you're a policymaker, researcher, entrepreneur, civic leader, donor or curious citizen, there is a place for you in the federation. Reach out to explore how to engage, or support our work directly.

kairos.title: Kairos
kairos.subtitle: The right moment, the right decision. Kairos is the PRIME framework for time-critical governance and strategic foresight.
kairos.p1: Kairos — from the Ancient Greek for the opportune, decisive moment — is the PRIME Society tool that helps leaders, communities and organizations identify when, where and how to act. It is one of several interoperable instruments in the PRIME toolkit.
kairos.e1: Early identification of governance windows of opportunity.
kairos.e3: Faster, more confident decisions in complex, high-stakes environments.
kairos.e4: A common vocabulary for purpose, results and measurement across teams.
kairos.how_p: Kairos sits on top of the broader PRIME Framework. It combines the PRIME principles — Purpose, Results, Innovation, Measurement, Empirical — with practical playbooks for sensemaking, scenario design and rapid execution.
kairos.flagship_subtitle: The first three Kairos apps are live and generating real impact — from volunteer matching to food rescue to impact-based funding.
kairos.app1_desc: A micro-task platform that matches skilled volunteers to urgent civic needs in minutes. From translation to legal support — every hour is verified, tracked and counted as impact.
kairos.app2_desc: An AI-coordinated redistribution network that connects surplus food from businesses to NGOs, shelters and families in need — with real-time logistics and verified delivery.
kairos.app3_desc: Outcome-based grant management with milestone verification, trust scoring and real-time disbursement. Funders see exactly where their money goes.
kairos.hestia_p1: Hestia is the AI orchestration layer inside Kairos — automating routine coordination while keeping humans firmly in control of every consequential decision.
kairos.hestia_p2: It monitors platform data, suggests actions, executes safe automations and alerts coordinators when human judgment is needed.
kairos.hestia_f1: Automated task routing and volunteer matching
kairos.hestia_f2: Proactive alerts for urgent needs and expiring offers
kairos.hestia_f4: Full audit trail — every action logged and auditable
kairos.how1_desc: Every app starts with a clear civic problem and a measurable success metric.
kairos.how2_desc: Kairos routes time, goods, capital and skills to where they're needed most.
kairos.how3_desc: Every action generates a trust signal — verified by multiple parties and logged immutably.
kairos.how4_desc: Hestia AI learns from outcomes and improves matching, routing and decision logic over time.
kairos.cta_subtitle: Whether you're an NGO, government, funder or technologist — there's a role for you in the Kairos ecosystem. Let's coordinate.

civitasnews.title: Welcome to the CivitasNews portal
civitasnews.intro: We bring you stories from around the world spotlighting visionary individuals and pioneering communities shaping the future through Charter Cities, Startup Cities, Global Cities, Network States, DAOs, Free Cities, Web3 innovations, City 5.0 concepts, AGE-Zones, and ZAPE initiatives.
civitasnews.a1_title: AI and the Fight Against Poverty: Friend or Foe?
civitasnews.a1_excerpt: Explores Universal Basic Income as a solution to poverty amid human labor displacement by automation.
civitasnews.a2_title: Culture as a Determining Factor of Success: Can It Be Influenced?
civitasnews.a2_excerpt: Comparative analysis of Brazil and Israel examining planning processes and gap analysis between intentions and outcomes.
civitasnews.a3_title: From Guesswork to Evidence: When Data Steers the Course to Decisions
civitasnews.a3_excerpt: Discusses how scientific evidence should inform societal decisions rather than unsupported beliefs.
civitasnews.jefferson_quote: “An informed citizenry is the bulwark of a democracy.”

engage.title: Time to Engage
engage.subtitle: Here, you'll find multiple ways to participate in and support the mission of the PRIME Society.
engage.b_products: Products: Access our webinars, seminars, and the book "PRIME Society — Innovation for a Poverty-Free Future."
engage.b_subscriptions: Subscriptions: Sponsor our CivitasNews portal or the Sense of Urgency podcast and join a global dialogue on innovation and governance.
engage.b_donations: Donations: Provide customized support to advance PRIME Society's initiatives and the development of City 5.0.
engage.b_volunteers: Volunteers: If you wish to collaborate directly, please reach out through our Contact Us page.
engage.closing: Every form of engagement contributes to building a future where technology, purpose, and human progress unite.
engage.fuller_quote: “You never change things by fighting the existing reality. To change something, build a new model that makes the existing model obsolete.”
engage.plan1_desc: Sponsor CivitasNews, PRIME Society's portal on innovation, governance and poverty eradication. Give your brand visibility in a global movement for impact and sustainable development.
engage.plan1_b1: Your brand on all pages of the Civitas portal
engage.plan1_b2: 1 sponsored article per week, aligned with your message
engage.plan1_b3: 1 exclusive interview per year with a company spokesperson
engage.plan1_b6: Free participation of 1 representative at all events
engage.plan2_desc: Sense of Urgency by CivitasNews: debates on innovation, governance and the future of cities. Ideas that inspire action and turn purpose into real impact.
engage.plan2_b3: 1 exclusive interview per year with a company spokesperson
engage.plan2_b5: Meetings with potential clients before or after
engage.plan2_b7: Free participation of 1 representative at all events
engage.donate_title: Help us create a poverty-free future — Donate Today!
engage.donate_p: In our hearts, we understand that poverty is a challenge to be overcome. Yet, we often feel powerless in the face of this overwhelming issue. Let PRIME Society be your ambassador for poverty eradication. With just a small monthly contribution, PRIME Society can continue to thrive for years to come. Please help us support Zones for Accelerated Poverty Eradication (ZAPE) worldwide.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Be Part of a Global Federation for Better Governance and Societal Progress. Join PRIME Society and help shape the future through purpose-driven innovation, measurable results, and actionable solutions.
contact.form_subtitle: Tell us a little about you and how you'd like to engage.
contact.f_message: How would you like to contribute?
contact.f_thanks: Thank you — we'll be in touch soon.
contact.ways_partner: As a Partner: Collaborate with us to create, support, or promote PRIME Societies.

contact.b2: Access cutting-edge resources, training, and tools.
contact.b3: Contribute to real solutions for societal challenges.
contact.b4: Collaborate with like-minded individuals and organizations.

Let PRIME Society be your ambassador for poverty eradication. With just a small monthly contribution, PRIME Society can continue to thrive for years to come.
